targets.rawSql:
WITH corp_payouts_summarized AS (
    SELECT 
        cje.second_party_id AS character_id,
        cje.ref_type,
        SUM(cje.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM alliance_auth.corptools_corporationwalletjournalentry cje
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.corptools_corporationwalletdivision cwd ON cje.division_id = cwd.id
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.corptools_corporationaudit ca ON cwd.corporation_id = ca.id
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.eveonline_evecorporationinfo ci ON ca.corporation_id = ci.id
    WHERE $__timeFilter(cje.date)
        AND cje.ref_type IN ('corporate_reward_payout')
        AND ci.corporation_id IN ($corporation)
    GROUP BY cje.second_party_id, cje.ref_type
),
char_journal_summarized AS (
    -- Standard Tax column entries
    SELECT 
        second_party_id AS character_id,
        ref_type,
        SUM(tax) AS total_amount
    FROM alliance_auth.corptools_characterwalletjournalentry
    WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
        AND tax > 0
        AND tax_receiver_id IN ($corporation)
    GROUP BY character_id, ref_type
),
char_direct_tax_summarized AS (
    -- Entries where 'amount' is the tax (e.g. PI, Reprocessing)
    -- Using first_party_id because the character is paying OUT to the corp
    SELECT 
        first_party_id AS character_id,
        ref_type,
        SUM(ABS(amount)) AS total_amount
    FROM alliance_auth.corptools_characterwalletjournalentry
    WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
        AND ref_type IN ('planetary_import_tax', 'planetary_export_tax', 'reprocessing_tax', 'brokers_fee', 'industry_job_tax', 'project_discovery_tax')
        AND second_party_id IN ($corporation)
    GROUP BY first_party_id, ref_type
),
combined_data AS (
    SELECT
        main.id AS main_id,
        main.character_name,
        entry.ref_type,
        entry.total_amount
    FROM (
        SELECT character_id, ref_type, total_amount FROM char_journal_summarized
        UNION ALL
        SELECT character_id, ref_type, total_amount FROM corp_payouts_summarized
        UNION ALL
        SELECT character_id, ref_type, total_amount FROM char_direct_tax_summarized
    ) entry
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.eveonline_evecharacter ec ON entry.character_id = ec.character_id
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.authentication_characterownership own ON ec.id = own.character_id
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.authentication_userprofile up ON own.user_id = up.user_id
    INNER JOIN alliance_auth.eveonline_evecharacter main ON up.main_character_id = main.id
),
top_characters AS (
    SELECT
        main_id,
        SUM(total_amount) AS character_total
    FROM combined_data
    GROUP BY main_id
    ORDER BY character_total DESC
    LIMIT 20
)
SELECT
    cd.character_name,
    cd.ref_type,
    SUM(cd.total_amount) AS total_sum
FROM combined_data cd
INNER JOIN top_characters tc ON cd.main_id = tc.main_id
GROUP BY
    cd.main_id,
    cd.character_name,
    cd.ref_type,
    tc.character_total
ORDER BY tc.character_total DESC, total_sum DESC

list.definition: SELECT corporation_name as __text, corporation_id as __value FROM eveonline_evecorporationinfo;
list.label: Receiver Corporation
list.name: corporation
list.query: SELECT corporation_name as __text, corporation_id as __value FROM eveonline_evecorporationinfo;
